Create new mizer model with detritus and carrion components

Source: R/newDetritusCarrionParams.R
newDetritusCarrionParams.Rd

Create new mizer model with detritus and carrion components

Usage

newDetritusCarrionParams(
  species_params,
  w_min_detritus = NA,
  w_max_detritus = 1,
  n = 0.7,
  ...
)

Arguments

species_params

A species parameter data frame

w_min_detritus

Minimum size of detritus in grams

w_max_detritus

Maximum size of detritus in grams

n

Growth exponent (also used as metabolic exponent p)

...

Extra parameters to be passed to newMultispeciesParams()

Value

A mizerShelf object

On this page
